content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer;


-- Bring calendar data
-- Example using DATA_SOURCE at Folder level
SELECT *
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'calendar.csv', --this is the option abfss
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV', 
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ';'
        ) AS calendar


EXEC sp_describe_first_result_set N'SELECT *
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''calendar.csv'', --this is the option abfss
        DATA_SOURCE = ''electric_vehicle_data_bronze'',
        FORMAT = ''CSV'', 
        PARSER_VERSION = ''2.0'', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '';''
        ) AS calendar'



-- Data scheme definition
SELECT *
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'calendar.csv', --this is the option abfss
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV', 
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ';'
        ) WITH (
            dateKey         INT 1,
            date            DATE 2,
            year            SMALLINT 3,
            month           TINYINT 4, 
            day             TINYINT 5,
            monthName       VARCHAR(10) 6,
            dayName         VARCHAR(10) 7,
            dayOfYear       SMALLINT 8,
            weekOfMonth     TINYINT 9,
            weekOfYear      TINYINT 10
            
            )
        AS [result];
